title: Dairatz
description: A mod that adds a tameable flying fairy companion.
body: # Dairatz Mod This mod adds tameable flying fairy companions to Minecraft. ## Bestiary | | Fairy | Biomes | Tame Item | |---|---|---|---| | | [Flower Fairy](https://github.com/onitofu/dairatz/wiki/Flower-Fairy) | Flower Forest, Meadow, Sunflower Plains | Poppy | | | [Winter Fairy](https://github.com/onitofu/dairatz/wiki/Winter-Fairy) | Snowy Plains, Snowy Taiga, Frozen River, and more | Sweet Berries | ## General Mechanics All fairies share the following behavior: - **Taming** — Hold the tame item and right-click the fairy. Each attempt has a 1-in-3 chance of success. - **Healing** — Right-click a tamed fairy with its tame item to heal it (+4 HP). - **Sitting on head** — Right-click a tamed fairy to place it on your head. Only one fairy can sit on your head at a time. Press **Shift** to dismount. - **Combat** — Tamed fairies automatically attack mobs that hurt the owner or that the owner attacks. They stop chasing if you move too far away. - **Teleportation** — Fairies teleport to you if they fall too far behind. - **Friendly fire** — Fairy projectiles cannot harm the owner or other fairies.
